_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin/NF2 loss-driven tumorigenesis linked to CRL4(DCAF1)-mediated inhibition of the hippo pathway kinases Lats1 and 2 in the nucleus.

_contextSnippet: 293T cells were transfected with His-ubiquitin and HA-tagged Lats1 or Lats2, treated with the proteasome inhibitor MG132
details: Used in ubiquitination assays to demonstrate that Lats1 is poly-ubiquitylated and Lats2 is oligo-ubiquitylated
